examples.text: Jag vill anmäla mig till kursen.

examples.text: Ni behöver inte betala. Jag bjuder!
Vi bjuder in alla till festen.

current entries were bare infinitive phrases; wrote a book sentence and a beech-tree sentence (context disambiguates the tree sense)

examples.text: Domen i Lund är mycket gammal.

notes: kept verdict example (meaning 0); wrote a cathedral example. Note: 'dom' for cathedral is somewhat formal (usually domkyrka), so kept it simple
